tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: The Little Mermaid - Part Of Your World
Killing Me Softly With His Song

content:
Pretty easy chords.... i made a chord list anyway... the chords just kind off
repeat through the whole song...
Enjoy ;)


[ch]Am[/ch]              - x02210
[ch]Am(maj7)/B[/ch]      - x22110
[ch]C[/ch]               - x32010
[ch]Dm[/ch]              - xx0231
[ch]G[/ch]               - 320033
[ch]F[/ch]               - 133211
[ch]E[/ch]               - 022100


[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]Am(maj7)/B[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]
Baby look at me[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Dm[/ch]              
And tell me what you see.[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You ain't seen the best of me yet[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                  [ch]E[/ch]                   [ch]Am[/ch]
Give me time, I'll make you forget the rest.[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Am(maj7)/B[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]              [ch]Dm[/ch]
I got more in me,     and you can set it free[/tab]
[tab] [ch]G[/ch]                        
I can catch the moon in my hand[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]E[/ch]
Don't you know who I am?[/tab]
